fieldValues.value: new ext:discovery extension, discovery.json schema (new), field.json (searchability classification), manifest.json (declaredExtensions), Record (Tier 2), TypedRecord (Tier 1), Note (Tier 0), Container (containerId filter)

Defines the Discovery Contract: structured DiscoveryQuery filter axes (typeId, typeNamespace, typeName, containerId, tag, lifecycleState, tier, contentMatch), a deterministic Text Projection algorithm (TextSegment structs) for all three instance tiers, NFC+lowercase normalization rules, and a conformance fixture specification. Introduces ext:discovery as an opt-in extension. Invariants I-012-1 through I-012-12. Tracked in srs#83.
